title: na'ats #5006
definition:
1) to spurn, contemn, despise, abhor
    1a) (Qal) to spurn, contemn
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to spurn
        1b2) to cause to contemn
    1c) (Hiphil) to spurn
    1d) (Hithpolel) to be contemned
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to spurn, contemn, despise, abhor
    1a) (Qal) to spurn, contemn
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to spurn
        1b2) to cause to contemn
    1c) (Hiphil) to spurn
    1d) (Hithpolel) to be contemned

    NASB:  to spurn, treat with contempt
